title: trace-event
description: canonical shape of a single trace-ledger event. one event per jsonl line.

event_id.description: content-addressable hash over the rest of the event, format 'sha256:<hex>'.

ledger_id.description: stable identifier for the ledger this event belongs to.

seq.description: per-ledger monotonic counter starting at 0; no gaps allowed.

event_type.description: must be a name listed in spec/event-types.yaml for the pinned spec version.

payload.description: event-type-specific body. shape is not constrained by this schema.

prev_hash.description: event_id of the previous event in this ledger; genesis is sha256:0...0 (64 zeros).
